CustomField.description: Write-only-from-LWC: the gantt LWC stamps its per-mount UUID on every DML it issues. The trigger reads this value and copies it onto the published Platform Event so other tabs/clients can drop self-echoes. Not exposed in page layouts; not part of any reporting model.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Per-mount gantt client nonce. Set automatically by the gantt LWC; do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Client Nonce
